members.label: other
members.long_form_open_description: Angled wooden handrail (medium-dark stain) running up the right-side stair flight with closely spaced white turned balusters; the balusters are decorative and create a repeating vertical pattern following the stair angle.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: runs above the stairs and diagonally across the right portion of the image, adjacent to the framed pictures on the wall
